body: Bill, hope you're doing well and that the back half of the year is treating you kindly. I wanted to reach out because I've been going back and forth on a potential follow-on into [Meridian Flux](companies/meridian-flux) — they're hitting the milestones we'd flagged at the seed, and the team is asking us to lead the A, which is exciting but also a meaningful check size for us at this stage. Given how closely you watched that space when you were still actively deploying, I'd genuinely value your read on whether you think the grid-edge storage opportunity has the tailwinds to justify the valuation they're anchoring to. I know you've seen a few of these cycles play out, and your instincts on timing have saved me from myself more than once. Would you have 30 minutes sometime next week to talk it through? Happy to send over the deck and our internal memo beforehand so we're not starting from scratch on the call.
